/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_f1ap_du.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/f1ap_du_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/f1ap_du_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/f1ap_du_connection_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/f1ap_du_metrics_collector_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/ue_context/f1ap_du_ue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/ue_context/ue_bearer_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/ue_context/f1c_du_bearer_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du.dir/ue_context/f1ap_du_ue_config_update.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_f1ap_du.a
